title: Equivalent fractions on the number line
description: Graph and identify equivalent fractions on a number line.
topic_path: Equivalent fractions on the number line

assessment_items.question_content:
**Move the dot to a fraction equivalent to $\greenE{\dfrac34}$ on the number line.**

[[☃ number-line 1]]
hints:
Numbers are equivalent when they are located at the same point on the number line.

Let's see what fraction is at the same location as $\greenE{\dfrac34}$ on the number line.

[[☃ image 1]]

 $\purpleD{\dfrac68}$ is at the same location on the number line as  $\greenE{\dfrac34}$.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Use the number line to find a fraction that is equivalent to $\dfrac14$ .**



[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Numbers are equivalent when they are located at the same point on the number line.

Let's see which point is at the same location as point ${\dfrac14}$ on the number line.

options.alt: A number line that has moving left to right, a starting tick mark at 0, a tick mark at one-twelfth, an unlabeled tick mark, a tick mark with a dot labeled one-fourth, eight unlabeled tick marks, and an ending tick mark at 1.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Which number line shows a number equivalent to $\dfrac{2}{6}$? **

[[☃ radio 2]]
hints:
Numbers are equivalent when they represent the same place on the number line.

Let's compare each point to $\blueD{\dfrac26}$ and find the equivalent fraction.
$\maroonD{L}$ is in the same place on the number line as $\blueD{\dfrac26}$.

The following number line is equivalent to $\dfrac{2}{6}$.



[[☃ image 1]]

choices.content: ![A number line that has moving left to right, a starting tick mark at 0, Point L, an unlabeled tick mark, and an ending tick mark at 1.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/03007bec0dee565bc3ee7abaa02fc2e4da326ced)

![A number line that has moving left to right, a starting tick mark at 0, Point M, two unlabeled tick marks, and an ending tick mark at 1.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/2a75467ff03894862846ba5b06f7626cf589d12d)

![A number line that has moving left to right, a starting tick mark at 0, three unlabeled tick marks, Point N, three unlabeled tick marks and an ending tick mark at 1.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/30bde7d44211495c0372026435b76dea935f2da7)
